title: N.A.N Vanilla Experience
description: N.A.N Vanilla Experience expands vanilla features by adding new blocks, items, world generation, and mobs while preserving the original aesthetic and gameplay style, with QOL features most of players need.
body:
![Not A Normal Vanilla Experience logo ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1072c897704df2344ec0ad6f139e0dbb43f704a.png)

#

**Do you ever find Minecraft boring and repetitive? But when you want to add mods to your game, you get confused because of the many additions to the game. Well I have a solution**

# N.A.N. Vanilla Experience
**N.A.N. stands for: "Not A Normal"** N.A.N Vanilla Experience modpack fixes some aspects that are lacking in the community as well as adding some features and additions to aspects that are already present in the vanilla game. 

## Performance
[![Built on Fabulously Optimized](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/built-with/fabulously-optimized_64h.png)](https://download.fo)

The Modpack is built on a popular optimization modpack "Fabulously Optimized" to ensure players will get the maximum performance from Minecraft itself. The difference between vanilla and this modpack is quite significant

## Additions
